name: Decline Dumbbell Fly
shortDescription: A fly movement on a 45-degree decline bench to isolate the lower chest with dumbbells.
instructions: Lay back on a 45-degree decline bench holding a dumbbell in each hand above chest. Lower the weights in an arc to sides until a stretch is felt, then bring them back together, squeezing the chest.
steps: Set bench to 45-degree decline, secure feet.
Lie back, arms extended above chest, slight bend in elbows.
Lower dumbbells in a wide arc to sides.
Pause at bottom for a stretch.
Return dumbbells to starting position, squeezing chest.
breathing: Inhale as you open arms, exhale as you bring weights together.
